ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Duration of the loan in months */,
  "credit_amount" REAL /* Amount of credit requested */,
  "investment_as_income_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of income invested as security */,
  "residence_since" INTEGER /* Number of years of residence */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the applicant */,
  "number_of_credits" INTEGER /* Number of previous credits taken by the applicant */,
  "people_liable_for" INTEGER /* Number of people liable for the loan */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the applicant (M/F) */,
  "credit_history_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the credit history of the applicant */,
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the purpose of the loan */,
  "savings_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the savings account status */,
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment status */,
  "other_debtors_id" INTEGER /* Reference to other debtors or guarantors */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property status */,
  "installment_plans_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the installment plans */,
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the housing status */,
  "skill_level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the skill level of the applicant */,
  "telephone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the telephone status */,
  "foreign_worker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the foreign worker status */,
  "y_true" INTEGER /* True label indicating the default status (1 for default, 0 for no default) */,
  "y_pred_score" REAL /* Predicted score for the default risk */,
  "y_pred" INTEGER /* Predicted label for the default risk (1 for default, 0 for no default) */,
  "clust_mask" TEXT /* Cluster mask for customer segmentation */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* The date when the loan application was submitted */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* The current status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* The annual income of the applicant */,
  "employment_start_date" TEXT /* The date when the applicant started their current employment */,
  "number_of_dependents" INTEGER /* The number of dependents the applicant has */,
  "residential_address" TEXT /* The residential address of the applicant */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* The credit score of the applicant */,
  "loan_purpose_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the loan purpose */,
  "loan_officer_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the loan officer handling the application */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* The user who created the application record */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* The user who last modified the application record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the application record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the application record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_other_debtors_id FOREIGN KEY ("other_debtors_id") REFERENCES other_debtors ("other_debtors_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_employment_id FOREIGN KEY ("employment_id") REFERENCES employment ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_purpose_id FOREIGN KEY ("purpose_id") REFERENCES purposes ("purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_credit_history_id FOREIGN KEY ("credit_history_id") REFERENCES credit_history ("credit_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_savings_id FOREIGN KEY ("savings_id") REFERENCES savings ("savings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_history" (
  "credit_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit history status */,
  "status_A11" INTEGER /* Indicator for status A11 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "status_A12" INTEGER /* Indicator for status A12 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "status_A13" INTEGER /* Indicator for status A13 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "status_A14" INTEGER /* Indicator for status A14 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "credit_history_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the credit history status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the credit history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the credit history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan purpose */,
  "purpose_A40" INTEGER /* Indicator for purpose A40 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "purpose_A41" INTEGER /* Indicator for purpose A41 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "purpose_A410" INTEGER /* Indicator for purpose A410 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "purpose_A42" INTEGER /* Indicator for purpose A42 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "purpose_A43" INTEGER /* Indicator for purpose A43 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "purpose_A44" INTEGER /* Indicator for purpose A44 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "purpose_A45" INTEGER /* Indicator for purpose A45 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "purpose_A46" INTEGER /* Indicator for purpose A46 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "purpose_A48" INTEGER /* Indicator for purpose A48 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "purpose_A49" INTEGER /* Indicator for purpose A49 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "purpose_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the loan purpose */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the purpose record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the purpose record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "savings" (
  "savings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each savings account status */,
  "savings_A61" INTEGER /* Indicator for savings A61 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "savings_A62" INTEGER /* Indicator for savings A62 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "savings_A63" INTEGER /* Indicator for savings A63 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "savings_A64" INTEGER /* Indicator for savings A64 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "savings_A65" INTEGER /* Indicator for savings A65 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "savings_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the savings account status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the savings record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the savings record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("savings_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "employment_A71" INTEGER /* Indicator for employment A71 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "employment_A72" INTEGER /* Indicator for employment A72 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "employment_A73" INTEGER /* Indicator for employment A73 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "employment_A74" INTEGER /* Indicator for employment A74 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "employment_A75" INTEGER /* Indicator for employment A75 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "employment_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the employment status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the employment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the employment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "other_debtors" (
  "other_debtors_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each other debtors or guarantors status */,
  "other_debtors_A101" INTEGER /* Indicator for other debtors A101 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "other_debtors_A102" INTEGER /* Indicator for other debtors A102 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "other_debtors_A103" INTEGER /* Indicator for other debtors A103 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "other_debtors_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the other debtors or guarantors status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the other debtors record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the other debtors record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("other_debtors_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property status */,
  "property_A121" INTEGER /* Indicator for property A121 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "property_A122" INTEGER /* Indicator for property A122 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "property_A123" INTEGER /* Indicator for property A123 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "property_A124" INTEGER /* Indicator for property A124 (1 if applicable, 0 otherwise) */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the property status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the property record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the property record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., loan officer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* The hashed password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
